events.text: Assessment complete: the exceeded permit scope is a fire-watch/fire-hazard control failure, not just paperwork, so I flagged it as a `fail` with `high` risk. Written to `/app/answer.json` with findings on the unpermitted-area exposure and corrective actions (stop work, amend/reissue permit, hazard survey, dedicated fire watch, retroactive inspection) citing NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926.352.
